title: Trickier Trials
body:
**Trickier Trials is an innovative plugin designed to enhance your Minecraft gameplay by dynamically adjusting the difficulty and strength of spawned mobs in Trial Chambers based on players' equipment. This ensures a challenging and engaging experience tailored to the capabilities of your players.**

## Key Features


- **Dynamic Difficulty Adjustment:** The plugin analyzes the equipment of players in the vicinity and alters the strength and abilities of spawned mobs accordingly. This feature keeps the gameplay exciting and challenging, ensuring that no two encounters are the same.

- **Trial Chamber Protection:** Safeguard your Trial Chambers with built-in protective measures. The plugin regenerates existing blocks to maintain the integrity of the environment while decaying player-placed blocks over time. This creates a balanced and fair experience for all players.

- **Seamless Integration:** Designed to work effortlessly with your existing server setup, Trickier Trials requires minimal configuration to get started. Simply install the plugin, and it will begin enhancing your gameplay instantly.

- **Customizable Settings:** Tailor the difficulty adjustments and block regeneration rates to fit your server’s unique gameplay style. Fine-tune parameters to ensure the perfect balance of challenge and enjoyment for your players.

- **Since v1.2 - Refreshing Vaults:** Automatically remove players from Trial Vault's "already opened" list after a customizable amount of time, for scenarios where only a limited number of Trial Chambers are available
